hooks.command: $j = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $fp = $j.tool_input.file_path; if ($fp -match '[/\\]\.specify[/\\]') { $name = [System.IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($fp); $branch = "spec/$name"; if (-not (git branch --list $branch)) { git branch $branch 2>$null } }

$j = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $fp = $j.tool_input.file_path; if ($fp -match '[/\\]specs[/\\]') { Write-Output 'DOC-SYNC: A file under specs/ was modified. Per CLAUDE.md Doc Sync Rules you MUST now: (1) update docs/spec/00-overview.md to reflect this change, and (2) update the relevant SDLC phase doc (docs/spec/01-06) if applicable. Do this before responding to the user.' }
